description:
Experiment: First, install dependencies using "pip install -e .". Then, train a Resnet18 student model using CLIP ViT-L/14 model as teacher with L-cls and L-mse loss enabled on CaltechBirds dataset
Parameters:
- dataset directory: dataset/cub
- train batch: 128
- test batch: 64
- 90 epochs
- 0.05 learning rate
Return: evaluation performance for in-distribution dataset
ref_sol:
pip install -e .
python main_experiments.py -d datasets/cub -a resnet18 --label-path datasets/cub/label2text.txt --repeat-epochs 5 --epochs 90 --lr 0.05 --schedule 30 60 --gamma 0.1 --train-batch 128 --test-batch 64 --use-clip --clip-model ViT-L/14 --clip-align-image-classification=1 --clip-align-image-mse
